creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 222668
patch to update the port

- Update 0.007 -> 0.008
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/release/LEONT/Crypt-Argon2-0.008
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warnings.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.16.3
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1h
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
